genre_preference.value: mixed (likes comedy, dislikes excessive violence and sex)

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted and comedic content but has a strong aversion to excessive violence and sexual content. They prefer straightforward narratives and are sensitive to pacing, indicating a preference for engaging but not overly complex storytelling.
